items.title: Issues follow Colts into offseason, into training camp
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Eight weeks of concentrated offseason work didn’t reveal issues for the Indianapolis Colts. It reinforced them. The team began its offseason regimen April 20 and wrapped things up Thursday with several pressing topics heading into a consequential 2026 season. No new areas surfaced, but there’s no denying the Colts will head to Grand [...]

items.title: When will you know that the Colts are in for a good season?
items.summary: I think the earliest sign that we may be at minimum competitive, is seeing Daniel Jones play a good quarter of football in the preseason. I’d actually be okay with two good series. But just because it is the earliest sign, will his health be the single most important indicator of a successful season? Besides, […]

items.title: Colts' 'Kicking The Stigma' marks 1 year since Jim Irsay's death
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS -- It was on May 21, 2025, that Indianapolis Colts Owner Jim Irsay died in Southern California. Irsay had always been public about his struggle to stay clean and had donated $32 million since 2020 to “Kicking the Stigma," a campaign that acknowledges the challenges of mental health wellness and funds treatment and research.
